name: Dropbox, Inc.
description: Dropbox, Inc. provides a collaboration platform that allows individuals, teams, and organizations to collaborate worldwide. The company offers Dropbox Paper, a collaborative workspace that enables users to create, share, and collaborate on content; Dropbox DocSend, a secure document sharing and analytics platform; and Dropbox Sign, an e-signature solution. It serves customers in professional services, technology, media, education, and other industries.
